properties.property: -- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text,Layzie;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text,Lonely Mirage;
-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text,K-Dawg Loxeus;
-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text,Shadow;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text,#s(vince_diesel) Ex-AMP/Melancholy Mirage#b -- One Of Classic's Best Sparers#b;
